title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
